title: adenophora morrisonensis subsp. uehatae
intro: Adenophora morrisonensis subsp. uehatae is a subspecies of the Adenophora morrisonensis plant, also known as the Taiwan bugbane or white flowers Adenophora. It is a perennial plant native to Taiwan, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Adenophora morrisonensis subsp. uehatae can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
